text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Gyaaah! I give up! Ugh... I still can't do it!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Being able to do that many in a row is amazing
enough...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
No way. I'm sure everyone and their grandma can
do at least five hundred...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I've gotta get stronger!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're more than halfway through October, still in
the middle of our preparations for the Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Matikanetannhauser receives a letter
from the reporter with the round glasses who had
interviewed her before.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Round glasses... Oh, that's right! From before the
Diamond Stakes?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Wow, this is exciting! I wonder what it says.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks to be a personal letter, so I hand it to her
unopened.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser seems perfectly relaxed
when she opens the letter, but...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hmmm... Okaaay...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hyah!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh my goodness... Oh my...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I-I need to go for a walk!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She runs out of the room without even waiting for
a reply. Her suspicious behavior piques my
curiosity, so I decide to follow her quietly...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She goes to a nearby hilltop. For whatever
reason, she seems to be keeping the letter at
arm's length.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Trainer?! What are you doing here?!
choice_data_list: I was worried about you. What's wrong?
I was worried about you. What's wrong?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Well, it's like...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser speaks slowly, struggling to
find the right words.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: My journey to find myself has ended...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still not quite understanding the situation, I take
a look at the letter, and find a message filled with
gratitude.

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Reporter
text_block_list.text:
"...The truth is, after I had a chance to talk with
you, I was transferred to a different department.
My current position is completely unrelated to
the world of Umamusume racing."

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Reporter
text_block_list.text:
"At first, it was difficult leaving behind a position
I worked so hard in and found so rewarding..."

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Reporter
text_block_list.text:
"But seeing you try so hard in your races inspired
me to be optimistic again."

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Reporter
text_block_list.text:
"Therefore, I wanted to send you, the one who
has given me courage countless times, this letter
of thanks, though selfish as it may be. "

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Reporter
text_block_list.text: "I know this might come off as rude, but..."

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Reporter
text_block_list.text:
"I think it's precisely because you're not special
that your positivity resonated with me so much."

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Reporter
text_block_list.text:
"If you were some beacon of talent and strength,
someone who existed on a completely different
level than me..."

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Reporter
text_block_list.text: "Your words would have never reached my heart."

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Reporter
text_block_list.text:
"People often say that you're a side character
because you're so normal..."

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Reporter
text_block_list.text:
"But that quality of yours is precisely why I
consider you as my one and only star."

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Reporter
text_block_list.text:
"Even if it's from a somewhat distant place, I'll
always be rooting for you."

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
...I always thought it takes someone special to be
a star.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I thought you had to be strong and you had to
shine. You had to be dependable and make
everyone want to follow in your footsteps.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
That's why I didn't understand what the director
was saying to me at first.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: But now... Now I get it.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Stars don't all have to be special!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I was able to inspire someone because I'm ordinary!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The moment I hear "star" said with such emphasis,
a certain memory of Matikanetannhauser's
beaming face comes to mind.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Rice is like her... well, I don't think "hero" is
exactly the right word.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But she's like this shining figure in her heart that
gives her the courage and strength to keep
going...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: She's her star.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser, who's usually so calm both
before and after races, got so excited back then.
choice_data_list: ...Do you want to be an even bigger star?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The truth is, over the past two years,
Matikanetannhauser's words have encouraged
many people to be able to look toward a brighter
future.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: An even bigger star?!
choice_data_list: You can do it, you know.
You can do it, you know.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I can?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser carefully smooths out the
crinkled edges of the letter.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: ...Right.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: To tell you the truth...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I've been ordinary my entire life.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I've never really wanted to be strong or become
this or that like Rice or Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
If I had to say, all I really wanted was to win and
see everyone's smiling faces.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: But, well...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser looks up at the sky as if
searching for the right words there...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Maybe being a star is different.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I still remember Bourbon's expression the day she
got her spark back.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Thinking back on it now, I think I was probably
jealous at the time.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to be able to inspire people the way that
Rice inspired Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: But that's not all.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: For some reason, I thought I could!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
And that feeling's stayed with me, refusing to go
away. That's why...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A long silence settles over us. And then...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Mun!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: All right! I'm gonna give it a shot!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Starting with the Japan Cup!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I want the same kind of power Rice had when she
inspired Bourbon...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I've made up my mind! I want the power to move
people's hearts!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I want to be a star!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Ow! Agh... Something just flew into my eye...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her speech doesn't end perfectly, but
something—even if only ever so slightly—changed
inside of her today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, there's a press conference for
the Umamusume running in the Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser. Can you tell us what's on
your mind in the lead-up to the Japan Cup?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I've always played a supporting role. I never saw
anything wrong with that, because I always
thought the most important thing was to win. But!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Things have changed.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna be the star of this Japan Cup!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: (Well said!)

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna show you a race so great that all of the
ordinary people like me out there will feel ready
to take on the world!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Word of Matikanetannhauser's response spreads
like wildfire.

text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text:
I'm thinking about going to the Japan Cup. I
heard Machitan's really motivated for it.

text_block_list.name: Woman B
text_block_list.text:
Oh really? I really like her too. It's like she's one
of us, but she stays so optimistic and tries so
hard.

text_block_list.name: Woman B
text_block_list.text:
Right? Watching her makes me feel like even
someone like me could be like her if I put my
mind to it.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: ...Ehehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Anticipation for the Japan Cup is growing slowly
but surely.
